title: T20 Vlakkie finals taken by Gorillas
description: GEORGE NEWS - The season seven George Rural...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The season seven George Rural Sports Development (GRSD) Vlakkie T20 finals reached a thrilling end as the Gorillas edged out the Rosedale Tigers in a nail-biting match.


> Both teams entered the final with just one loss each from the round-robin stage, showcasing formidable batting line-ups and relentless bowling attacks. The final was held in Conville.


Winning the toss, the Gorillas opted to bat first but found themselves under immense pressure from the Tigers' disciplined bowling attack. Despite their reputation for strong batting, the Gorillas only managed to post a modest total of 63 runs in their 20 overs.

The Tigers' chase proved to be equally dramatic. The tension mounted as the match came down to the final ball.

Ultimately, the Gorillas' determination and sharp fielding saw them clinch the victory, securing their first-ever title in the GRSD Vlakkie T20 tournament.

Sammy Voster, chairperson of the GRSD, commended the high calibre of cricket displayed throughout the season. He extended his gratitude to all participants and supporters.


> In other finals, the Rebels emerged victorious in the Shield category, while Conville United claimed the Plate title.


For further details and highlights from the season, fans and supporters are encouraged to follow GRSD's social media channels.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
